name_en: Cultural Heritage, Handicrafts and Tourism Organization
name_fa: سازمان میراث فرهنگی، صنایع دستی و گردشگری
description: Iran's government agency responsible for cultural heritage preservation, handicrafts promotion, and tourism development. During the [Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad) presidency, it became a power base for [Esfandiar Rahim Mashaei](/people/esfandiar-rahim-mashaei) and his associates, who used the organization to promote Iranian nationalist ideology. Successive heads from Ahmadinejad's inner circle — Mashaei (2005–2009), [Hamid Baghaei](/people/hamid-baghaei) (2009–2011), and [Mohammad Sharif Malekzadeh](/people/mohammad-sharif-malekzadeh) (2012–2013) — reinforced its role as a factional stronghold.

sources.title: Cultural Heritage, Handicrafts and Tourism Organization — Wikipedia

editorial_notes: Renamed/restructured multiple times. Currently called Ministry of Cultural Heritage, Tourism and Handicrafts (elevated to ministry status 2019).
